name: stock-omx-loop
description: Repo-local plugin for operating the stock workspace Discord bridge and OMX autonomous loop from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Operate and repair the stock repo Discord-driven loop.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local plugin that points Codex at the stock workspace's Discord bridge, OMX loop, state files, and Windows launch scripts.
defaultPrompt: Use $stock-discord-loop to inspect the Discord bridge and repair the OMX loop in this repo.
Use $ralph-discord-loop to run this repository through .ralph-loop.yml with strict branch safety.
Use $stock-discord-loop to run the stock workspace loop in signal-only Discord mode.
Use $stock-discord-loop to verify the bridge, state files, and Windows launch scripts.
